Quick Start
🔥 Claim Your Franchise
The Process

HOW IT WORKS

Three simple steps from inquiry to your first waffle sold.

01
📞

Contact Us

Reach out via WhatsApp or call. We'll walk you through the franchise details, location requirements, and answer all your questions — no pressure.

02
🏆

Get Trained

Join our 2-day hands-on training program. Learn waffle recipes, operations, customer service, and everything to run a profitable stall.

03
🚀

Launch & Earn

Receive your fully-equipped push cart and starter kit. Set up your stall, serve your first customers, and start earning from day one!

What's Included

EVERYTHING YOU NEED

🧇
Premium Waffle Recipes

Access to our full menu of signature waffle recipes — classic, chocolate, fruit, and more. Recipes engineered for maximum taste and repeat customers.

🎨
Full Branding Package

Complete branded signage, cart graphics, packaging, and uniforms. Your stall will look premium and attract attention from the first day.

📱
Marketing & Social Support

We help you with digital marketing, social media content, and local promotion strategies to bring customers to your stall consistently.

⚙️
Equipment & Tools

Commercial-grade waffle makers, toppings dispensers, and all serving tools — everything selected for durability and high-volume use.

📊
Business Operations Guide

Pricing strategy, inventory management, supplier contacts, and daily operations playbook — so you run your business like a pro from day one.

🌟
Location Guidance

Our team helps you identify high-footfall spots in your city — malls, colleges, markets — to maximize your daily sales and visibility.
